title: Senior Financial Analyst - CRISIL Consulting Pvt Ltd - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - CRISIL Consulting Pvt Ltd - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, CRISIL Consulting Pvt Ltd in Faridabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About CRISIL Consulting Pvt Ltd:
CRISIL Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CRISIL Consulting Pvt Ltd!
